# multi-service

Proxy extensions with two services including cluster ref and multiple headers

!!! tip "Direction: `roundtrip`"

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Direction | `roundtrip` |
| Path | `testdata/cases/extensions/multi-service` |

## Input

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
data:
  extension.config: |
    extensions:
      - name: httpbin
        backend:
          connectionTimeout: 2s
          keepAlive: 15s
          idleConnectionTimeout: 60s
          maxIdleConnections: 30
          services:
            - url: http://httpbin.org
              cluster:
                name: some-cluster
                server: https://some-cluster
              headers:
                - name: Authorization
                  value: $extension.httpbin.token
                - name: X-Request-Id
                  value: argocd
      - name: metrics
        backend:
          maxIdleConnections: 10
          services:
            - url: https://metrics.example.com
              headers:
                - name: Authorization
                  value: $extension.metrics.token
```

## Expected ArgoCDConfiguration

### `configuration.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: argoproj.io/v1alpha1
kind: ArgoCDConfiguration
metadata:
  name: argocd-config
  namespace: argocd
spec:
  server:
    extensions:
    - connectionTimeout: 2s
      idleConnectionTimeout: 1m0s
      keepAlive: 15s
      maxIdleConnections: 30
      name: httpbin
      services:
      - cluster:
          name: some-cluster
          serverURL: https://some-cluster
        headers:
        - name: Authorization
          value: $extension.httpbin.token
        - name: X-Request-Id
          value: argocd
        url: http://httpbin.org
    - maxIdleConnections: 10
      name: metrics
      services:
      - headers:
        - name: Authorization
          value: $extension.metrics.token
        url: https://metrics.example.com
```

## Expected ConfigMaps

### `argocd-cm.yaml`

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
data:
  extension.config: |
    extensions:
    - Backend:
        services:
        - cluster:
            name: some-cluster
            server: https://some-cluster
          headers:
          - name: Authorization
            value: $extension.httpbin.token
          - name: X-Request-Id
            value: argocd
          url: http://httpbin.org
        transport:
          connectionTimeout: 2s
          idleConnectionTimeout: 1m0s
          keepAlive: 15s
          maxIdleConnections: 30
      Name: httpbin
    - Backend:
        services:
        - headers:
          - name: Authorization
            value: $extension.metrics.token
          url: https://metrics.example.com
        transport:
          maxIdleConnections: 10
      Name: metrics
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

```yaml
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-cmd-params-cm
  namespace: argocd
```

```yaml
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: argocd-rbac-cm
  namespace: argocd
```
